# Koine Studio

> Koine Studio is the browser IDE for Koine, a domain-specific language for Domain-Driven Design. You write a bounded context's ubiquitous language once in `.koi` files and Koine generates idiomatic, self-contained code (C#, TypeScript, Python, PHP) — value objects, entities, aggregates, invariants, commands, events, state machines, repositories and the CQRS/application layer.

## What you can do here

- Edit `.koi` models in a live editor with push-based diagnostics.
- See the emitted code preview (C#/TypeScript/Python/PHP) update as you type.
- Explore the domain as an editable diagram, a construct outline, a relationships table and a ubiquitous-language glossary.
- Check model-version compatibility against a baseline.
- Ask the built-in AI domain copilot to draft, review or explain a model (bring your own Anthropic or OpenAI-compatible key).

## Links

- Docs & language reference: https://atypical-consulting.github.io/Koine/
- Source & issues: https://github.com/Atypical-Consulting/Koine
